rule_metadata.name: derusbi_kernel
rule_metadata.author: Airbus Defence and Space Cybersecurity CSIRT - Fabien Perigaud

rules.rule_text:
rule derusbi_kernel
{
	meta:
		description = "Derusbi Driver version"
		date = "2015-12-09"
		author = "Airbus Defence and Space Cybersecurity CSIRT - Fabien Perigaud"
		reference = "http://blog.airbuscybersecurity.com/post/2015/11/Newcomers-in-the-Derusbi-family"

	strings:
		$token1 = "$$$--Hello"
		$token2 = "Wrod--$$$"
		$cfg = "XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"
		$class = ".?AVPCC_BASEMOD@@"
		$MZ = "MZ"

	condition:
		$MZ at 0 and $token1 and $token2 and $cfg and $class
}
